text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity standing here, at the boundary between sterile meeting room and this colorful, creative space. The world outside the glass seems to beckon with routines and rules, while the R+D area invites me into inquiry and active engagement. The tilted lines and vivid colors lend everything an offbeat, slightly disorienting charm, prompting me to reflect on innovation, connection, and my own evolving place within these thoughtful environments. I am both grounded and inspired.
